positive: Minimalist abstract wildlife silhouette of a majestic mountain lion leaping across a rugged canyon at sunset. The style is clean, modern, and high-contrast linework with a distressed ink look. The composition is central and balanced, emphasizing the dynamic action and the geometric shapes of the landscape. Color direction should use deep indigo blues, burnt orange, and charcoal blacks, printed on white material. Highly detailed, vector art quality, suitable for screen printing, strong black lines, crisp outlines, symmetrical composition.
negative: low detail, blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grayscale, photorealism, complex shading, gradient, logos, trademarks, celebrity likenesses, copyrighted characters, artist names
